heading: Definitions
label: 300x–34 Definitions
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1934 of act , was classified to and subsequently omitted from the Code.July 1, 1944section 300y–24 of this title

Amendments2022—Par. (4). amended par. (4) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (4) read as follows: “The term ‘substance abuse’ means the abuse of alcohol or other drugs.”Pub. L. 117–3282016—Pars. (3), (7). substituted “substance use disorders” for “substance abuse”.Pub. L. 114–255
amendments: Amendments2022—Par. (4). amended par. (4) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (4) read as follows: “The term ‘substance abuse’ means the abuse of alcohol or other drugs.”Pub. L. 117–3282016—Pars. (3), (7). substituted “substance use disorders” for “substance abuse”.Pub. L. 114–255

children.text: The term “authorized activities”, subject to , means the activities described in .section 300x–31 of this titlesection 300x–21(b) of this title
The term “funding agreement”, with respect to a grant under to a State, means that the Secretary may make such a grant only if the State makes the agreement involved.section 300x–21 of this title
The term “prevention activities”, subject to , means activities to prevent substance use disorders.section 300x–31 of this title
The term “substance use disorder” means the recurrent use of alcohol or other drugs that causes clinically significant impairment.
The term “treatment activities” means treatment services and, subject to , authorized activities that are related to treatment services.section 300x–31 of this title
The term “treatment facility” means an entity that provides treatment services.
The term “treatment services”, subject to , means treatment for substance use disorders.section 300x–31 of this title
